title: codereview-1: as_uint change should include dedicated test for >4 byte truncation case per RFC robustness
description: Add test in codec.rs tests to verify as_uint([0x01,0x02,0x03,0x04,0x05]) == 0x02030405
close_reason: Added dedicated test as_uint_truncates_long_values verifying last-4-bytes behavior for 5-byte and 4-byte cases; test passes. Updated as_uint in codec.rs:836-849
